case_title: ELDIGARDES P. WAYE VS. SERGIO BERCELLI

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAYE, ELDIGARDES P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BECERRILL, SERGIO $530.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF DAMAGES FOR BREACH OF THE COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS DENIED.
